content:
Additional Services:


Adaptive Marketing Strategy: We'll stay agile, adjusting our strategies to navigate market shifts and platform changes, ensuring the client's marketing efforts remain innovative and effective.

Client Collaboration: Ongoing communication and regular feedback sessions with the client will ensure our strategies align with their vision and adapt to their evolving needs.

3D Scanning and Drone Footage: To enrich property presentations and virtual tours, we will engage local independent contractors for specialized services, including 3D scanning and drone footage, at an additional agreed-upon fee. This approach allows us to leverage expert skills in capturing each property’s unique features and attractiveness, offering potential buyers immersive and engaging visual experiences.

3. Costs and Fees


Our structured pricing model is designed to provide comprehensive marketing services within a predictable budget, ensuring transparency and accountability in every aspect of our financial relationship:
context: From document: Statement of Work (SOW) for Marketing Services for Florida Luxury… — chunk 4 (chunk 4/11)
